$comment: English message catalogue keyed by dotted, locale-agnostic reason codes (codes double as i18n keys — Welsh would be a drop-in sibling file). This key list IS the reason-code contract: engine/reasons.js registers exactly these codes and i18n/resolve.js throws on any code not present here, so a raw code can never reach the DOM. Key grammar: <prefix>.<obligationName>.<detail> for prefixes mandate/format/rule (the middle segment must be a real obligation name from obligations.json), plus the generic scope.answered provenance code interpolated with {answer} and {field}. Strings are lifted verbatim from spike-a (parity-facts.json is the checklist). Per Rulings item 3 the mandate.* codes surface as soft prompts at CYA POST — only mandate.fullName.missing ever blocks a page save.

messages.format.dateOfBirth.notRealDate: Date of birth must be a real date
messages.format.driverDob.notRealDate: Date of birth must be a real date
messages.format.year.notWholeNumber: Year must be a whole number
messages.format.yearsNoClaims.notNumber: Years no claims must be a number
messages.format.yearsNoClaims.notWholeNumber: Years no claims must be a whole number
messages.format.yearsNoClaims.outOfRange: Years no claims is out of range
messages.format.penaltyPoints.notNumber: Penalty points must be a number
messages.format.penaltyPoints.notWholeNumber: Penalty points must be a whole number
messages.format.penaltyPoints.outOfRange: Penalty points is out of range
messages.format.ncdYears.wholeNumberRange: Years to protect must be a whole number between 1 and 99
messages.format.estimatedValue.notAmount: Estimated value must be an amount
messages.format.estimatedValue.notPositive: Estimated value must be greater than 0
messages.format.excessAmount.notAmount: Excess amount must be an amount
messages.format.excessAmount.notPositive: Excess amount must be greater than 0
messages.format.claimAmount.invalid: Claim amount must be a whole number of pounds greater than 0, like 1500
messages.format.modValue.invalid: Modification value must be a whole number of pounds greater than 0, like 1500
messages.rule.dateOfBirth.minAge: The main driver must be at least 17 years old
messages.rule.excessAmount.withinValue: Voluntary excess cannot be more than the vehicle's estimated value
